style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward like powdered sugar, each particle refracting soft pastel light in hues of lavender and peach. A delicate petal-shaped aura pulses gently around its body, shedding translucent floral fragments that dissolve into the air. The aura glows with a warm, honeyed amber light that casts a soft, inviting glow on the surrounding terrain, while faint musical note vibrations shimmer in the air as subtle ripples of iridescent color. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
